name: libdevel-lexalias-perl
title: libdevel-lexalias-perl
summary: Perl module that provides alias lexical variables
description:
Perl module that provides alias lexical variables
Devel::LexAlias provides the ability to alias a lexical variable in a
subroutines scope to one of your choosing.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libdevel-lexalias-perl because Perl module that provides alias lexical variables.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libdevel-lexalias-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libdevel-lexalias-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libdevel-lexalias-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
